UpdateAppBlbIpGroupProtocol.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string with a maximum length of 64 characters
UpdateAppBlbIpGroupProtocol.id: ID of the IP group protocol
UpdateAppBlbIpGroupProtocol.healthCheck: Health check protocol type (HTTPS, HTTP, TCP, UDP, ICMP). Mapping between listener protocol (type) and health check protocol (healthCheck): (type)TCP->(healthCheck)TCP; (type)UDP->(healthCheck)UDP, ICMP; (type)HTTP->(healthCheck)TCP, HTTP; (type)HTTPS->(healthCheck)TCP, HTTP, HTTPS
UpdateAppBlbIpGroupProtocol.healthCheckUrlPath: Health check path, default is /, effective when the health check protocol is HTTP
UpdateAppBlbIpGroupProtocol.healthCheckTimeoutInSecond: Health check timeout in seconds, default is 3, must be an integer between 1 and 60
UpdateAppBlbIpGroupProtocol.healthCheckIntervalInSecond: Health check interval in seconds, default is 3, must be an integer between 1 and 10
UpdateAppBlbIpGroupProtocol.healthCheckDownRetry: Unhealthy threshold, i.e., the number of consecutive failed health checks before the backend server is blocked. Default is 3, must be an integer between 2 and 5
UpdateAppBlbIpGroupProtocol.healthCheckUpRetry: Healthy threshold, i.e., the number of consecutive successful health checks before the backend server is marked as available again. Default is 3, must be an integer between 2 and 5
UpdateAppBlbIpGroupProtocol.healthCheckNormalStatus: HTTP status codes considered normal during health checks, supports combinations of 5 status code classes, e.g., "http_1xx"
UpdateAppBlbIpGroupProtocol.healthCheckHost: Host header of health check requests sent to backend servers, e.g., "localhost", default is empty, effective when the health check protocol is HTTP
UpdateAppBlbIpGroupProtocol.udpHealthCheckString: UDP health check string, effective when the health check protocol is UDP
